center.name: 日本列島
center.summary: 日本列島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括綠雉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green pheasant (Phasianus versicolor), also known as the Japanese green pheasant or Kiji, is an omnivorous bird native to the Japanese archipelago, to which it is endemic. Some taxonomic authorities consider it a subspecies of the common pheasant, Phasianus colchicus. It is the national bird of Japan
